title: [UNOFFICIAL] Doc's Apotheosis
description: A fan-made modpack using the Drehmal.net modlist as reference, with additional performance enhancers and gameplay tweaks.
body:
This fan-made modpack is based on the modlist/modpack file provided by the team behind the Drehmal: Primordial project. Its been slightly altered for additional performance boosts and gameplay functionality tailored toward my private server, but that doesnt stop anyone outside the server from using this.

Attributions:
-Custom Entity Models: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/custom-entity-models-cem

Special thanks to the creators of Drehmal for allowing me to host their resourcepack in this pack
